Author: Juusohel
Name: Bunny Sub Sync
Punchline: Pushes your submarine voyages to subs.bnuuy.gg automatically.
Description: Captures submarine voyage results (route, loot, timings) as they happen and pushes them to your Bunny Sub Tracker account. Pair it with a plugin token from your Profile page, map your in-game free companies/submarines to their platform counterparts, then let it run. Command: /bunnysync
